text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm at the library trying to come
up with a training plan...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, that's too safe as well...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I have a tendency to take the safe route
no matter what I do, whether it be in races or
training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
When it rains, I do the same amount of exercise
indoors. When I am fatigued, I readjust my
schedule so I can rest.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Establishing such safe parameters makes for
predictable results. On the other hand, taking
risks invites unpredictability, which can be a
curse... but also a boon.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As such, I have concluded that there is value in
taking some risks in order to expand my line of
reasoning.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I forced myself out of my comfort zone and began
planning a workout on a dirt course to avoid
injury...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But that's when I realized I was taking the safe
option once again!
choice_data_list: Don't think with your head—just act.
It'll only do you harm if you injure yourself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: My head? Are you trying to imply that it's—oh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Every time someone mentions something about
my head, well, it makes me think they're teasing
me about how big it is...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. You were trying to tell me that
theories are just empty words unless I act on
them, correct?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Act rather than think... I suppose that is the more
reckless path.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I think I've had a small epiphany.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying that erring on the side of caution
is acceptable? I suppose I should take a trainer's
word for it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Then that means I can still use this thesis I
wrote up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Do you think you could read through it? If
you don't mind, that is.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I call it "Safe Training with Reasonable Risk."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide shows me her paper, and her
methods are indeed cautious... but they should
make for safe and effective training.
